docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WHELAN, ANDREW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SPAAPEN, MICHIEL A. P. M. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
